description: Listing-sensitivity check: unitary-preserving relistings compiled by production compilers (Qiskit L3, pytket FPO no-swap, Cirq) and flat-list prototype. Wave-5: 10 families x n={3,5,8} x 20-50 variants. Wave-6 fill (2026-07-21): remaining 5 families (UCCSD_inspired, VQE, Adder, QuantumWalk, SurfaceCode) completed; coverage now 15/15 families. Note: Adder/QuantumWalk/SurfaceCode have ancilla/coin qubits, so recorded n_qubits is the ACTUAL count (4-10), selected by nominal size via circuit_id. qwalk_8 partial: 3/20 variants (compute budget; ~190 s/variant). qwalk_8 unitary_check = skip (exact Operator check infeasible at 9 qubits; relisting is unitary-preserving by construction and verified exactly at qwalk_3/qwalk_5).
